ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2020 Continued To Sep-01-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court Against Vincent Isch
Off Calendar Jun-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Schermco, Inc., having been continued from June 2, 2020 for further default prove-up hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

David Nied, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Ad Astra Group, LLP, and also as the Person Most Knowledgable for plaintiff.
Mr. Nied was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Vincent Isch.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed October 9, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Vincent Isch occurred on April 16, 2019 and was effectuated on April 27, 2109.
Default as to defendant Vincent Isch was entered on June 3, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 23, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Ad Astra Law Group, LLP, and against the defaulted defendant Vincent Isch, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,806.19.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,574.88.
Costs - $590.88.

Total - $34,971.95.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
